title: BBL Portals
description: A Custom Portal creation tool with kubejs support
body:
Portals
Overview

BBL Portals allow the creation of custom portals to any dimension using KubeJS or built into your mod. Portals are highly customizable with some options including either nether portal like or end portal like. The portals can be built from any block and the portal block inside can have 1 or 3 different textures. This mod also uses the same kubejs intergration as Portal JS so you can replace both Custom Portal API and Portal JS with this. This mod also fixes a lot of bugs with both Custom Portal API and Portal JS fixing sodium for colored portals crashes with flint and steel use and other. This mod also adds jade support to view the dimenion location when looking at a portal block

How To Use

This mod can be used with KubeJS as well as with Java for direct mod support. Wiki contains information for how to do both https://github.com/benbenlaw/BBL-Portals/wiki 

Credit

This mod was made possible by Custom Portal API and Portal JS. Without these mods this mod would not be possible 

Support

Join the BBL Discord for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on Patreon to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
